notes: Need to press ESC to get past the black screen in the main menu. Other than that, there are some graphical glitches, faces have missing bits so you can see through (like eyeballs, teeth from the inside).
title: Draugen

notes: As others have said, just need to press ESC at launch to get past blank screen. Completed game with no issues or crashes. Tested resolution: 2560 x 1440 with max settings. Performance / Framerate were nice and smooth.

notes: Besides the black-screen-escape-trick, runs without any problems.
title: Draugen

notes: Black screen on start up (just press esc) and after credits (stuck). Entire game worked perfectly with steam controller.
title: Draugen

notes:
Technically, the game deserves the Platinum rating but it has a few minor issues hence Silver. You need to press Esc (or (B) on controller) to skip an unplayable video right after start. Changing from Windowed Fullscreen to just Fullscreen or back sometimes causes the game to crash with a message "Fatal error" (not very verbose). After the final credits the game suggests to press a button (Start, apparently but the icon looks like a hamburger menu) to return to the main menu but after that it freezes on a black screen, nothing helps except killing the game from the Steam overlay.

I played the game through to the end (took about 3 hours) in Big Picture with Steam Controller. No visual or sound glitches, no crashes/freezes, decent FPS, perfectly playable.
title: Draugen

notes: I did not test any settings except switching from windowed fullscreen to just fullscreen. The game launches normally apart from the bugs other mention (press escape at the starting black screen). However, after a minute or so or after finishing with loading after New Game is clicked, the game crashes with a message of critical error and some hex number above.
title: Draugen

notes: Still has the same issues (needs esc on start, stuck after credits, crashes when trying to change from windowed to full-screen), but plays flawlessly. Completed the game with good performance on Ultra. Also wasn't able to change resolution and ratio in the video settings — it's stuck at 1920x1080.
title: Draugen

notes:
Same issues reported by others. You have to press the esc key for the game to actually load. When you try to switch from windowed mode to fullscreen it crashes. After that you are able to play the game and the performance is mostly ok at the maximum quality. The frame rate fluctuates a little more than desirable and near the end of the game there are severe drops in places that were reaching 60 fps before with no issues. And after the credits the game freezes.

Despite all of these problems it is still possible to enjoy the game.
title: Draugen
